channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Old furniture with smashed mirror, 29th June
item.description:
Old wooden furniture dumped, with smashed mirror and sharp shards, blocking several spaces in communal car park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70;72;74;76;78;80, Coppice Gate, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thistles and stinging nettles, 29th June
item.description:
Along the PROW all behind Cooper’s Edge school and up to the field by the M5. Lots of stinging nettles, thistles and thorns obstructing a clear path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Napier Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference around stw stop tap cover 400x300x21mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown stinging netals approx 20 metres x1 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference around stw stop tap cover 400x150x20mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 29th June
item.description:
ENWD Sunken BT Cover Please Make Safe (Section 81 Raised) Standard TM - Footway Closure - No Alternative Footway (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 sunken rocking kerb stone stats required 900x150x40mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 29th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th June

item.title: Sofa left on footpath in St Stephen’s Road, 29th June
item.description:
Sofa left near corner of St Stephen’s Road and Andover Road, outside Hanover House.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Saint Stephen's Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stile obstructed, 29th June
item.description:
Stile is overgrown with brambles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmiths Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parabola Road deep long narrow trench, 29th June
item.description:
Adjacent to lamp No.1. We now have 'tram track' type gapa in this road. Hazard to narrow wheeled vehicles getting stuck in the 'track' groove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parabola Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
